name: Fullstack Verification Audit
description: I want you to verify like everything has been implemented and is working properly

goal.answer: Verify that all 4 phases of the Homebrew Haven Supabase backend implementation are complete and working, fix any bugs found, run tests, and validate against the live Supabase backend.

criteria.answer:
All AGENTS.md Phase 1-4 files exist and are wired to Supabase (not mock data)
TypeScript compiles with zero errors (`tsc --noEmit`)
Production build passes (`npm run build`)
All mutation handlers have error handling (try/catch or onError)
No direct `supabase` calls in page/component files outside hooks/lib
At least 4 meaningful tests exist and pass (`npm run test`)
Integration script confirms live Supabase connectivity and schema
Dead code removed and Vite code splitting configured
Mobile checklist verified: dialogs, capture=environment, Sheet filters, 44px tap targets

constraints.answer: Never expose SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY in source or logs, Never commit .env.local, Do not modify existing project config (vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json) unless explicitly required, All Supabase queries must remain inside hooks/contexts — no direct JSX calls

phases.answer: Fix Code Issues & Conventions, Tests & Integration Verification

assumptions.answer: The Supabase project at .env.local is live and reachable; User has already executed SUPABASE_STEPS.md SQL in Supabase dashboard; The human can re-run type generation after schema changes if needed; browser-image-compression package is already installed and working

phases.name: Fix Code Issues & Conventions
phases.goal: Fix all missing error handling, refactor direct Supabase calls in LiveTasting.tsx into hooks, remove dead code, and add Vite code splitting.
phases.description: This phase addresses every issue found in the audit: 9 mutation handlers without error handling, LiveTasting.tsx violating the 'no direct supabase calls in components' rule, unused database.types.ts dead code, and a 1.28MB un-split bundle.

steps.description: Wrap all 9 mutation handlers in try/catch or add onError handlers (BatchDetail.tsx x3, Profile.tsx x2, FermentationMonitor.tsx x1, RecipeVault.tsx x1, BrewSetup.tsx x1, Challenges.tsx x1)

verification.command: grep -c 'try\|catch\|onError' src/pages/BatchDetail.tsx src/pages/Profile.tsx src/pages/FermentationMonitor.tsx src/pages/RecipeVault.tsx src/pages/BrewSetup.tsx src/pages/Challenges.tsx

steps.description: Create useTastingMessages and useTastingNotes hooks, refactor LiveTasting.tsx to use them instead of inline supabase inserts
Add manual chunks to vite.config.ts for code splitting (vendor/react, supabase, charts)
Build verification: npm run build must pass

phases.summary: Phase 1 complete: wrapped all mutation handlers in try/catch or onError across 6 files (BatchDetail, Profile, FermentationMonitor, RecipeVault, BrewSetup, Challenges); created useTastingMessages.ts and added useLatestTastingSession/useCreateTastingSession to useTastingNotes.ts, fully refactored LiveTasting.tsx to use hooks instead of inline supabase calls; removed 836-line dead code file database.types.ts; added Vite manualChunks for code splitting into vendor-react, vendor-supabase, vendor-query, vendor-charts; verified zero TypeScript errors and successful production build.

phases.name: Tests & Integration Verification
phases.goal: Write meaningful tests for critical hooks, create an integration verification script, and validate live Supabase connectivity.
phases.description: The current test suite has only one stub test. This phase adds real tests for auth, batches, and uploads hooks, plus a Node.js integration script that pings the live Supabase project to verify tables and schema match expectations.

steps.description: Write tests for src/lib/auth.ts (signUp, signIn, signOut patterns)

verification.command: test -f src/lib/auth.test.ts && npx vitest run src/lib/auth.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.description: Write tests for src/hooks/useBatches.ts query/mutation patterns with mock query client

verification.command: test -f src/hooks/useBatches.test.ts && npx vitest run src/hooks/useBatches.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.description: Write tests for src/hooks/useUpload.ts image compression and path generation logic

verification.command: test -f src/hooks/useUpload.test.ts && npx vitest run src/hooks/useUpload.test.ts --reporter=verbose

steps.description: Create scripts/verify-supabase.mjs that connects to live Supabase and lists tables to confirm schema
Run full test suite: npm run test

phases.summary: Phase 2 complete: wrote 20 meaningful tests across 3 new test files (auth: 9 tests, useBatches: 6 tests, useUpload: 5 tests) covering signUp/signIn/signOut/OAuth, batch CRUD queries/mutations, and image compression/upload flow. Created scripts/verify-supabase.mjs which connected to the live Supabase project and confirmed all 15 expected tables exist. Full test suite runs 21/21 passing in ~5s. Fixed React act() warnings in useUpload tests.

goal: Verify that all 4 phases of the Homebrew Haven Supabase backend implementation are complete and working, fix any bugs found, run tests, and validate against the live Supabase backend.
successCriteria: All AGENTS.md Phase 1-4 files exist and are wired to Supabase (not mock data)
All mutation handlers have error handling (try/catch or onError)
No direct `supabase` calls in page/component files outside hooks/lib
At least 4 meaningful tests exist and pass (`npm run test`)
Integration script confirms live Supabase connectivity and schema
Dead code removed and Vite code splitting configured
Mobile checklist verified: dialogs, capture=environment, Sheet filters, 44px tap targets

Do not modify existing project config (vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, tsconfig.json) unless explicitly required
All Supabase queries must remain inside hooks/contexts — no direct JSX calls
